user_system_path: Deterministic execution is controlled by FOLDERA_EXECUTION_QUEUE.yaml. Tasks 001-005 are completed, Task 006 remains queued, and no queue item is currently active in PR #183.
no_routing_contract: The Agent is forbidden from asking 'What is next?' or 'Should we audit this?'. The Agent must read FOLDERA_EXECUTION_QUEUE.yaml and follow its ordered state exactly. If a queue PR intentionally stops with no ACTIVE task, the Agent must not promote the next QUEUED task without explicit source-truth closeout. The Agent may not deviate from the queue without a signed-off QUEUE_UPDATE commit from Brandon.
allowed_files_raw: Current seam is queue-control closeout only: keep Tasks 001-005 completed, keep Task 006 queued, and align source-truth plus gate/test files without starting Task 006.
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/provider/schema/Supabase/Vercel/live Slack/PR #142/Stripe/auth/landing/dashboard work, no package/dependency changes, no data mutation, no migrations, no live connector fetch, no paid/model call, no fake claims, and no broad cleanup.

stop_condition: Stop when the queue-controlled source truth and gate/test layer both accept Tasks 001-005 as completed and Task 006 as queued with no active task.
